    "Energy source missed during isolation setup (stored hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor energy not discharged or blocked)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt any work on the isolated system.",
    "Revoke the active safe work permit.",
    "Identify, isolate, and safely dissipate or restrain all stored energy sources (hydraulic, gravity, and capacitors) in accordance with the energy control procedure.",
    "Re-verify zero energy state before work is allowed to resume."
  ],
  "rationale": "The lockout/tagout setup failed to isolate and dissipate all energy sources, specifically missing stored hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor energy. Under OSHA 1910.147, all potentially hazardous stored or residual energy must be relieved, disconnected, restrained, and otherwise rendered safe. Failure to do so poses an immediate, critical safety hazard to personnel.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(5)(i)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(6)"
  ]
